===================
=== BOB DYLAN 1976-04-21 Tampa (source 1 audiowhore repair).txt
===================
===================
===================

BOB DYLAN and the
Rolling Thunder Revue - part II

Curtis Hixon Convention Center
Tampa, Florida
21 April 1976


1. Mr Tambourine Man
2. Tangled Up In Blue
3. Vincent Van Gogh
4. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
5. Maggies Farm
6. One Too Many Mornings
X. Seven Days - REMOVED (Officially released on The Bootleg Series Vol.1-3)

7. Railroad Boy
8. Wild Mountain Thyme
9. Blowin In The Wind
10. Shelter from the Storm
11. I Threw It All Away
12. Isis
13. Going, Going, Gone
14. Romance in Durango
15. Lay Lady Lay
X. Silver Mantis - MISSING from this source
16. Idiot Wind
17. Knockin on Heaven's Door
X. Gotta Travel On - MISSING from this source

======

1-2 Bob solo acoustic
3 with Bobby Neuwirth
7-9 with Joan Baez
17 with Roger McGuinn

======

audiowhore repair project - 1976

source used: LB-4271 (Master>CDR>EAC>Flac)

Notes about this recording:
- all thanks to the taper for being there
- mono recording
- pitch was too high and speed too fast
- i found that the sound altered throughout from being between 0.2 Semitones to 0.61 Semitones off pitch
- Seven Days from this concert has been officially released and is REMOVED.


What i have done:
- adjust pitch and speed for each song individually to correct
- repaired as best as possible the major volume and quality drop through most of Romance In Durango
- fix SBEs
- eq mixing to better balance sound
- some hard limit on loud clapping
- tape flips, minor dropouts, microphone bumps cleaned/manually removed.
- No Noise or hiss reduction used.


Notes about other sources of this show:
LB-4598 and LB-12196 are derived from the same alternate recording to LB-4271.
Both sources are of a similar sound quality so i have fixed them both.


========

Rolling Thunder Revue part II ensemble:

Bob Dylan
Scarlet Rivera (violin)
T-bone J. Henry Burnette (guitar & piano)
Steven Soles (guitar)
Mick Ronson (guitar)
Bobby Neuwirth (guitar & vocal)
Roger McGuinn (guitar & vocal)
David Mansfield (steel guitar, mandolin, violin & dobro)
Rob Stoner (bass)
Howie Wyeth (drums)
Gary Burke (congas).

========

If you have enjoyed hearing this repaired version of Tampa 1976, it is one of many shows that I have repaired and am continuing to work on.
I will keep sharing these on Dime if the following requests are respected:
- Do not post this audio on youtube (this means you Mr Tamborine)
- Do not repost anywhere in mp3 or degraded sound quality (youtube can be worse resolution than mp3!)
- If you feel the need to repost this on other sites, please retain this info file and credit appropriately
- Not for sale or profit, for free sharing only.

========

Thanks to: the taper (please contact me of you're out there), Les Kokay and his 'Songs of the Underground' publication, LosslessBob, Dylanchords.com, and my Cambridge friends.

========

First posted to Dime on the 45th anniversary of this concert.
===================
===================
===================

===================
=== ORIGINAL Notes.txt.txt
===================
===================
===================
Tampa, Florida, Curtis Hixon Convention Center, 21 April 76

CD1
1.	Mr Tambourine Man - solo
2.	Tangled Up In Blue - solo
3.	Vincent Van Gogh (with Neuwirth)
4.	I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
5.	Maggies Farm
6.	One Too Many Mornings
7.	Seven Days

CD2
1.	Railroad Boy (duet with Baez)
2.	Wild Mountain Thyme (duet with Baez)
3.	Blowin In The Wind (duet with Baez)

4.	Shelter from the Storm
5.	I Threw It All Away
6.	Isis
7.	Going, Going, Gone
8.	Romance in Durango
9.	Lay Lady Lay
[-].	Silver Mantis
10.	Idiot Wind
11.	Knockin on Heaven's Door (with McGuinn)

Master > CDR > EAC > Flac
===================
===================
===================
